title: Polarizer, polarizing plate, and optical display device comprising same
abstract: Provided are a polarizer comprising a polyvinyl alcohol-based film and having an endothermic peak of 50Â° C. to 60Â° C. when measured by differential scanning calorimetry at a temperature increase rate of 10Â° C./min; a polarizing plate comprising a polarizer and a first protective film and a second protective film laminated on one surface and the other surface of the polarizer, respectively, and having an initial shrinkage initiation temperature greater than 70Â° C. and less than or equal to 90Â° C. during thermomechanical analysis; and an optical display device comprising same.
claims: 1. A polarizer, comprising a polyvinyl alcohol based film, and having an endothermic peak of 50° C. to 60° C., as measured at a temperature elevation rate of 10° C./min by differential scanning calorimetry.
